Uncertainity - Intraday post (10/Oct)

Window of Risk:

Window of Risk, Disbalance - Investigating the story that the market tells

Weekly post:

Short vanna, short veta, short fly - Weekly post (06-10/Oct)

INTRADAY POSTCoding today’s positioning:

Today again, we have a steep short risk reversal pattern, so the speed is negative both locally both on a net basis. The most supportive range is the centroid of 6690.75Below this, the downside gamma is magnetic towards 6682.47,above, we have vacuum up towards 6767.49, if the upside pivot of 6736.95 is broken (to leave behind the downside gravity).

However the vacuum up effect is the strongest in the first hours.Locally, we have 6748/52 zone that is very hard to break, almost like impossible, if spot doesn’t open above this. Then the upside pivot is pinning. Upside max I code 6780 then reversion back to 6760s area.

OptionsDepth Heatmap

The market prices in a thin right-tail, vaccum upward, but the local positioning favors for more downside or rangeing around the centroid and 6703.71/6710.44 area… very supportive.So the pricing says: ranging or up (more like up), but the local effects make it hard, and favor for ranging or down. 2 points for ranging…I don’t trade this setup, maybe some small contract selling, nothing more.
